description: Multi-language automated exam generation and grading system

features.name: Authentication & Session Management API
features.description: Provides user registration, login, role verification, and secure JWT session management.
features.evidence: Full auth arc DONE (stdlib, zero deps): (core) security.py PBKDF2-SHA256 + HS256 JWT + deps.py get_current_user/require_role/get_current_user_optional (SPEC-AUTH-001/002/003); (Gate-1) sensitive endpoints gated with require_role (SPEC-AUTH-004); (Gate-2) frontend login — api.ts token mgmt (localStorage, typeof window guard) + loginRequest + authHeaders on protected calls + 401 auto-clear; login/page.tsx; /admin & /admin/bank redirect to /login if unauthenticated + Logout. Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY in browser (preview + real backend with seeded admin): unauth /admin -> /login; login admin -> /admin (stats load) & /admin/bank (lists draft); logout clears token -> /login; candidate /exam/{id} opens WITHOUT login; teacher-answer toggle without auth -> graceful 'không có quyền' amber banner (Claude fixed a notice-persistence bug where the revert re-fetch wiped it) + answers stay hidden + no crash; console 0 errors; npm run build PASS. NOTE: verified on Dat; the LIVE demo (main) still has OPEN endpoints until Dat->main is merged + a strong ADMIN_PASSWORD env is set on Render.

features.name: Database Migrations Engine
features.description: Uses Alembic migrations to automatically apply and rollback database schema changes.
features.evidence: Alembic configured in backend/alembic (env.py reads DATABASE_URL from settings, engine built in code so no creds in alembic.ini). 2 migrations: 3a99aac81951 (baseline 7 tables) + 69936c2cdac2 (M2: blueprints, import_batches, content_hash/source_question_id/import_batch_id). Verified MANUALLY: `alembic upgrade head` runs clean on empty PostgreSQL 17 (both revisions applied; Migration 2's ALTER ADD CONSTRAINT is PG-only, fails on SQLite by design). No automated pytest coverage — tests use create_all() on SQLite in-memory. Task 0c, PR #16 (0c265c9).

features.name: Exam & Question Bank CRUD API
features.description: Enables teachers to manage exams, view question banks, and approve imported questions.
features.evidence: Bank-admin CRUD API (A5, SPEC-BANK-003) + Exam generation API (SPEC-EXAM-001, SPEC-GEN-004) done. Bank-admin UI (A6) at /admin/bank (bulk approve draft). Endpoints GATED (Gate-1, SPEC-AUTH-004: admin/teacher only; include_answers teacher-only) + frontend login (Gate-2) securing /admin & /admin/bank behind JWT. Exam lifecycle CRUD (A7, SPEC-EXAM-002: update metadata, release, retire, and candidate-view filtering) completed and protected under auth gating. Candidates or guest users are restricted from viewing retired exams (receive 404). Verified via integration tests (test_specs_exam.py). Lifecycle UI (A8, frontend) at /admin: per-exam status badge (Đã phát hành/Đã ẩn), Ẩn đề/Phát hành toggle, inline Sửa (title+duration) — listExams forwards auth so admins see retired exams while guests get active-only. npm run build PASS; Claude verified in browser on real demo DB (retire flips badge & keeps exam in admin list, guest list hides retired, inline edit saves without 422).

features.name: Candidate Exam Room Front-end
features.description: Provides webcam proctoring hooks, tab visibility checking, and compressed Opus/WebM audio recording.
features.evidence: Basic candidate take-exam UI exists (/exam/[id]/take, C2) under the exam-submission-grading feature. useMediaRecorder.ts is NOW USED for Speaking answers (record/upload audio -> POST /submissions/upload-audio -> AI grade via grade_speaking; see exam-submission-grading C10). But THIS feature's actual scope — PROCTORING (webcam monitoring, tab-visibility checking via useProctoring.ts) — is still NOT wired. Status stays not_started until proctoring is integrated.

features.name: Gemini AI Grading Service
features.description: Connects to Gemini API to grade writing essays and speaking audio recordings based on rubrics.
features.evidence: backend/app/services/ai_grading.py — grade_writing()/grade_speaking() with safe mock fallback; verified by tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_SPEC_GRADE_004_ai_grading_degrades_safely (SPEC-GRADE-004 active).

features.name: Background Task Grading Queue
features.description: Celery workers consume submitted candidate exams from Redis queue and trigger asynchronous grading.
features.evidence: app/core/celery.py configured; app/workers/tasks.py grade_submission_task NOW WIRED to the submit API (SPEC-GRADE-003 active). submission_admin.create_submission_and_grade routes by question type: exams containing writing/speaking questions enqueue grade_submission_task.delay() and return immediately with status='grading' (no scores); the worker grades essays via ai_grading_service (Gemini, mock-safe degrade per SPEC-GRADE-004) and writes Grade.score_writing/score_speaking + submission.status='completed'. Pure multiple-choice TOEIC exams keep synchronous scaled grading (SPEC-SUBMIT-001 unchanged); non-TOEIC exams without essays still 400. No model change (Grade already had score_writing/score_speaking/feedback_* columns). Verified by tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_SPEC_GRADE_003_async_grading_via_celery (celery task_always_eager + AI mock mode + worker SessionLocal pointed at the test engine; asserts immediate 'grading' response then worker fills grades + status='completed'). NOTE: SPEC-GRADE-003 test runs in eager mode; a real Redis broker + `celery -A app.core.celery worker` is needed for true async in production. Speaking path is wired in the worker but no audio-upload submit flow/UI exists yet.

features.name: English Exam Ingestion Engine
features.description: Parses Word/Excel/MP3 data, extracts sections, maps audio files, and runs UTF-8 formatting validators.
features.evidence: backend/app/services/parser.py — import_file(db, filepath, audio_dir=None) parses .docx [Group]/[Question] blocks (python-docx), validation gate (missing options/answer, invalid part, missing Listening audio file), atomic save via ImportBatch, idempotent dedup via content_hash on bank (exam_id IS NULL), items stored status='draft'. Verified by tests/test_specs_parser.py: SPEC-PARSE-001/002/003/004 active (no incomplete questions; Listening audio existence per convention {SetID}_P{Part}_{NN}.mp3; idempotent reimport; all-or-nothing + JSON error report). A3 (d2388e8, SPEC-PARSE-005 active): parse_answer_key(filepath) reads answer keys from separate .xlsx (openpyxl, scans 'Câu'/'Đáp án' header, merges 5 column-blocks) — VERIFIED on REAL partner file Key LT2601.xlsx (100 answers, matches actual data). IMPORTANT: current import_file parses a SYNTHETIC .docx format ([Group]/[Question], inline answers) that does NOT match real partner docs (real = Word tables + images, answers in separate .xlsx). Real parser track STEP ① DONE — parse_listening_docx(filepath)->{set_id, items} (SPEC-PARSE-006 active); STEP ② DONE — import_listening_set(db, docx_path, key_path) merges answer keys into questions by Mã đề+number, validates items, registers ImportBatch, and commits all questions/groups to the DB question bank with status='draft' (SPEC-PARSE-007 active). Fixed question-level hash collision in Part 1 and Part 2 (where identical content and empty options caused duplicate elimination) by incorporating set_id and question number in calculate_question_hash and set_id in calculate_group_hash, while preserving backward compatibility. Verified on real file pair LT2601.docx + Key LT2601.xlsx to produce 100/100 unique question hashes and 23/23 group hashes with 0 collisions. STEP ③ DONE — convert_doc_to_docx(filepath, out_dir=None) converts legacy .doc -> .docx via headless LibreOffice (soffice --headless --convert-to docx), with .docx passthrough, result caching, and clear FileNotFoundError when soffice missing (SPEC-PARSE-008 active). CI tests are MOCK-ONLY (passthrough + missing-tool + cache via tmp_path); REAL .doc conversion VERIFIED on machine (15/06, LibreOffice 26.2 installed): convert_doc_to_docx round-trips a real binary .doc -> .docx preserving 15 tables, python-docx reads output (soffice headless via the function's Windows fallback path). Actual partner RT*.doc will be exercised when building the Reading parser. STEP ④ DONE — parse_reading_docx(filepath)->{set_id, items} parses real Reading RT*.docx (SPEC-PARSE-009 active): P5 standalone (Q1-30), P6 4-blank passages (Q31-46), P7 single/double/triple passages with images (Q47-100); robust option extraction handling inline-A, all-options-inline (re.DOTALL + regex-split on (A-D) markers), sandwich quotation paragraphs, and 4x2 option tables. VERIFIED on REAL 'CDR TOEIC - RT2605.docx': 100 questions, 0 incomplete (every question exactly 4 options A-D). Two fixture-invisible bugs caught at Claude review and fixed: infinite loop (inner loop never advanced j) and option loss (30/70 grouped questions). STEP ⑤ DONE — import_exam_set(db, docx_path, key_path, exam_type, audio_dir=None) generalizes merge+import for BOTH Listening and Reading (dispatch parser by exam_type, LT|RT set_id); import_listening_set/import_reading_set are thin wrappers (SPEC-PARSE-010 active). VERIFIED on real data (Claude independent): LT2601 -> 100 questions/23 groups, RT2605 -> 100 questions/20 groups, both idempotent; LT+RT coexist in one DB (200 questions/43 groups/0 without answer). MILESTONE: full Listening+Reading TEXT pipeline (parse .docx/.doc + merge .xlsx keys + import to bank) works on real partner data. Remaining: compiled-MP3 audio rework (Listening audio model). STEP ⑥ DONE — find_audio_file(audio_dir, set_id) + import_exam_set link consolidated MP3 to audio_url at FILE level by filename range/single match (anchored regex), non-fatal (None if absent), reporting audio_linked + audio_ambiguous (SPEC-PARSE-011 active). Decision (Đạt+Claude): NO audio cutting — matrix has no such rule, partner has no timestamps, models frozen, cutting needs a new dep. Verified on 15 real MP3 filenames: all 15 sets mapped; only LT2603/LT2605 ambiguous (overlapping partner ranges). MILESTONE: real ingestion pipeline COMPLETE (parse .docx/.doc + merge .xlsx keys + link audio -> bank), verified on real partner data (LT2601+RT2605 = 200 questions + audio). Status -> active. Remaining for broader feature: HTTP API exposure (separate bank-admin-api feature); legacy synthetic import_file superseded by import_exam_set for real data. Tasks A1 (fe11fa3) + A2 (c019be0) + A3 (d2388e8) + PARSE-006 (8239a88 + c65eb57) + PARSE-007 (a6fdf99) + PARSE-008 (37c25cc + cfd5431) + PARSE-009 (4668e44 + 0712a8a) + PARSE-010 (e2941f3) + PARSE-011 (ef2ced4).

features.name: TOEIC & B1 Exam Generator
features.description: Retrieves questions from the approved question bank and matches exam blueprints dynamically.
features.evidence: TOEIC generator near-complete: status='approved' filter (BANK-001), seeded reproducibility (GEN-005), fail-fast pre-checks (GEN-006), Part 7 subset-sum (GEN-001), adaptive topic-diversity cap (GEN-003), option balance (GEN-002), per-part difficulty matrix (MATRIX-002 per-part), post-check validator gate (SPEC-VALIDATE-001), batch generation with ENFORCED pairwise overlap <= 40% (SPEC-GEN-004 active), and whole-exam difficulty ratio 25/50/25 (SPEC-MATRIX-002 whole-exam active). generate_batch (toeic_generator.py) enforces the limit via deterministic resample-on-violation (bounded 10*count attempts), atomic batch rollback on failure, and uses expunge_all + temporary expire_on_commit=False so the session stays clean (0 SAWarnings) and detached exams remain readable on the API path. API POST /api/v1/exams/generate-batch returns summaries + overlap_report (threshold, resample_count) + validation summary. test_SPEC_GEN_004_cross_exam_overlap loops base_seed [5,8,21,23] (incl. seeds 8 & 21 that need resampling) asserting 0 < max_overlap <= 0.40 on a 4x surplus bank with diverse Part 7 group sizes (2-6). Claude verified independently: 0/30 random seeds exceed 40% (enforcement holds; without it 2/30 failed), API path safe with resample (no DetachedInstanceError), suite clean. Data-driven generation supported (GEN-007). Whole-exam difficulty balanced by configuring mock bank P7 difficulties in conftest.py such that the subset-sum selection yields exactly 15E/25M/14H. STILL in_progress: B1/VSTEP & HSK generators not built.

features.name: Automated Exam Validator Gate
features.description: Checks generated exams against constraints, question overlap limits (<40%), and content completeness.
features.evidence: Implemented unified validation module validate_exam in app/services/exam_validator.py checking GEN-001 (blueprint counts by part type), MATRIX-002 (per-part difficulty, skipping Part 7), GEN-003 (topic diversity covering P7), GEN-002 (options balance), and ISOLATE-003 (group isolation/orphans). Integrated post-check validation in toeic_generator.py; validation failure triggers atomic deletion (Question -> QuestionGroup -> Exam with synchronize_session=False + commit) and raises ExamValidationError. Added SPEC-VALIDATE-001 in specs.json. Fully tested in tests/test_specs_generation.py: refactored all generation tests to use validate_exam; added test_SPEC_VALIDATE_001_post_check_cleanup (verifies rollback on failure via monkeypatch); added test_validate_exam_catches_violations (manual database injection of constraint violations). Suite stable across two runs: 37 passed / 2 skipped / 2 xfailed; ruff clean; architecture checks pass.

features.name: Exam Submission & Automated Grading API
features.description: Enables candidates to submit exam answers and automatically grades them via the TOEIC grader.
features.evidence: Full candidate exam-taking + auto-grading loop, frozen models reused (no model change). BACKEND: POST /api/v1/exams/{exam_id}/submit (auth) persists Submission+SubmissionDetail, runs grade_toeic_submission (TOEIC scaled scoring via GRADE-001 table), returns L/R/total (SPEC-SUBMIT-001); GET /api/v1/submissions/{id} gated owner|admin|teacher; GET /api/v1/exams/{exam_id}/submissions (admin/teacher list per-exam results) + GET /api/v1/submissions/me (candidate own history) (SPEC-SUBMIT-002). Scores stored in semantically-named columns Grade.score_listening / Grade.score_reading (SPEC-GRADE-002 active, gap closed): migration a1b2c3d4e5f6 adds the two columns (additive, Float nullable); toeic_grader writes L/R there, submission_admin + all listing endpoints read them; score_speaking/score_writing retained for the essay/AI grading path. Claude verified: pytest 47/1/0 (GRADE-002 xfail->pass) + end-to-end real grading run (all-correct -> score_listening=495/score_reading=495, speaking/writing stay 0). FRONTEND: /exam/[id]/take take-exam UI (C2, login-gated, submits ALL questions incl. blank), /exams catalog + /register + role-based login routing (C3 candidate portal), /admin/results/[examId] teacher results table + /my-results candidate history (C5). Verified by tests/test_specs_submission.py::test_SPEC_SUBMIT_001/002 (pytest 46/1/1) + Claude LIVE-curl on Render (register->login->submit->grade, all-correct=990) + browser (candidate take->score; teacher 5-row results table). C1/C2/C3 DEPLOYED LIVE (main 9721c6b); C4/C5 + GRADE-002 on Dat awaiting deploy. C6 (Dat): candidate Writing UI — TakeView renders a textarea for type='writing' questions and polls getSubmission until status='completed', then shows the AI score + per-essay feedback; SubmissionResult scores made nullable; CELERY_TASK_ALWAYS_EAGER added so essay grading completes inline without a separate Celery worker/Redis (local demo + Render free). C7 (Dat): VSTEP B1 demo exam (2nd exam type) seeded directly (scripts/seed_vstep_demo.py: Reading MCQ + Writing) and the result panel shows BOTH the auto-graded MCQ score and the AI Writing feedback for mixed exams. Verified browser end-to-end (VSTEP take -> 3/4 reading + AI writing 8/10). NOTE: multi-exam-type generation from the shared bank is blocked until Question gets an exam_type/language column (frozen model, needs Đạt approval); VSTEP currently seeded, not generated. C8 (exam_type+writing_score in listing -> teacher results table + /my-results show essay scores). C9 (/submissions/[id] detail page: read essay/answer + AI feedback; owner|teacher gated, linked from results table + history). C10 (Speaking: POST /submissions/upload-audio stores recording -> audio_url; TakeView record/upload UI; grade_speaking AI-graded; detail page shows audio player + transcription + pronunciation). GRADE-003+C6+C7+C8+C9 DEPLOYED LIVE (main 069e483); C10 on Dat awaiting deploy. AI grading is mock on LIVE until GEMINI_API_KEY set on Render. Verified: pytest 52/0/0 + browser end-to-end.
